name: Chicken Roasted with Parsley
recipeInstructions:
Remove giblets from the chicken; save for another use.
Rinse the chicken and pat dry. Stuff loosely with fresh parsley.
Combine olive oil, lemon juice, chopped parsley, dried thyme, and dried tarragon in a bowl.
Rub the mixture all over the chicken.
Sprinkle salt, pepper, and paprika on the chicken.
Crimp small squares of aluminum foil around the wing tips and drumsticks.
Place the chicken, breast side down, on a rack set in a baking dish. Do not cover with foil.
Rotate the dish midway through cooking and microwave on high for 15 minutes.
Turn the chicken over and sprinkle with more paprika if needed. Microwave for an additional 13 to 15 minutes.
Let stand for 8 minutes before testing for doneness. Makes 6 servings.
